title: Lesson 339: 向かう, 迎える, 昔...

items.gloss: to face; to go towards; to head towards

to go out to meet; to receive; to welcome; to greet; to salute; to hail; to reach; to approach; to enter (a phase, era, etc.); to accept (e.g. as a member of a group or family); to call for; to summon; to invite; to approach (a certain time, a point in one's life, etc.)

insect; bug; cricket; moth; worm; roundworm; one's emotions; one's feelings; nervousness; fretfulness; person devoted to one thing; single-minded person; valve core; mushi (type of game played with a stripped deck)
daughter; girl (i.e. a young, unmarried woman)
